g.text: WC-2026 venues — capacity, location, and goals scored
All 16 host venues on a Natural-Earth basemap. Dot size ∝ stadium capacity; fill colour = goals scored to date.
Goal leaders: Foxborough (24g, 65k) · East Rutherford (23g, 82k) · Inglewood (22g, 70k).
